method: select the thinnest complete next product loop
separate already-authorized work from genuine human decisions

repositories.name: Meta-Harness

selectedAuthority.basis: Gate 0A exact remote and local authority evidence

repositories.endgame: A thin replaceable repository operating layer that preserves durable intent, authority, evidence, and continuation while borrowing planning and execution intelligence from the model.
repositories.currentUsefulCapability: Authority-bound execution custody, canonical truth, packaged 0.3.0 substrate, and an unbanked D088 thin-loop candidate.
repositories.currentProductBottleneck: Reduce and prove the D088 candidate rather than creating another repository-containment or governance programme.
repositories.thinnestCompleteNextProductLoop: Contract D088 to authoritative surfaces, preserve Gate 0A evidence, run the three-repository proof, select the smallest response, validate one immutable candidate, and obtain exact-commit audit.
repositories.strongestAlternative: Keep D085 finance-first target lock active and select one external coding-plus-specialist slice immediately.
repositories.alreadyAuthorizedWork: Gate 0B double-prime candidate proof: contraction, read-only comparison, response selection, pinned-runtime validation, and candidate freeze.
repositories.actualHumanDecision: None before the exact candidate audit; controller activation remains a later authority action.
repositories.unansweredUncertainty: Whether exact-commit independent audit accepts the contracted D088 package and selected invariant.

repositories.name: Quant

obviousCheckout.head: accef5c6be62f63cfc57f0118e0b6b7ae46fad4f
obviousCheckout.note: Large tracked deletion and untracked mirror state; not used for product planning.

repositories.endgame: A finance GodView product that turns portfolio state and multidisciplinary judgment into certified, decision-useful product outputs without overstating domain validity.
repositories.currentUsefulCapability: F1A synthetic OPEN is banked and independently closed with exact PortfolioBook, snapshots, certification, and injected read-only adapter; product 43/43, protocol 137/137, combined 180/180.
repositories.currentProductBottleneck: The second representative component state has not traversed the proven product path.
repositories.thinnestCompleteNextProductLoop: Open F1B only and send NO_POSITION through the identical book, certification, and adapter path.
repositories.strongestAlternative: Publish or route the existing OPEN result as a permanent bundle before proving the second component state.
repositories.alreadyAuthorizedWork: F1B only; F1C/F1D, permanent publication, default routing, providers, real data, PEAD reopen, and FS1 remain closed.
repositories.unansweredUncertainty: Only F1B implementation evidence and independent acceptance; no product-direction question is open.

repositories.name: Leningrad

selectedAuthority.note: The Alpha 0 product spine is currently working local bytes but absent from a named Git object.

repositories.endgame: Ship one bounded, auditable swarm counterfactual product that traces a declared mechanism change through collective outcomes under protected exogenous randomness.
repositories.currentUsefulCapability: The Alpha 0 functional mechanism is materially sufficient at 77/100 and the development suite passes 51 tests, but release readiness is 29/100.
repositories.currentProductBottleneck: Repository custody: the tested Alpha 0 product spine is untracked while superseded research owns Git history.
repositories.thinnestCompleteNextProductLoop: Create the already-specified clean non-release product-custody slice from main@e8fd08d77e5a, import only the Alpha 0 spine, bank FS-1F_BASELINE_ONLY, then run target CPython 3.12 compile, tests, and CLI smoke.
repositories.strongestAlternative: Continue independent-oracle, trusted-attestation, or mechanism research directly in the contaminated checkout.
repositories.alreadyAuthorizedWork: A0-SHIP Slice 1 product custody only; no additional model, research, adaptation, topology, deployment, or certification work.
repositories.actualHumanDecision: None for the custody slice; later release authority remains gated.
repositories.unansweredUncertainty: Whether the exact clean product spine passes the target CPython 3.12 environment after banking.

differences: Meta-Harness: contract and prove the operating method itself.
Quant: execute the next NO_POSITION product vertical through a proven path.
Leningrad: bank existing product bytes into Git custody before deeper verification or research.

commonObservedBottleneck.statement: The obvious checkout is not a trustworthy execution authority; accepted or product-relevant state exists in another worktree/ref or is absent from Git custody.
objectiveSignals: current checkout stale or on superseded direction
accepted ref/worktree differs from obvious checkout
product bytes are not reachable from the named Git authority

availableBaseline.contextStrategy: Use compact current-truth artifacts where available and one current ship-gate review where not.

measurement.claimCeiling: This run proves differentiated recommendations and a repeated entry-authority defect. It does not prove a quantified time reduction; the R3 rerun must instrument elapsed time and context volume.

responsesCompared.reason: All three repositories required manual authority reconstruction, and the obvious checkout could direct planning from stale, contaminated, or unversioned state.
Guidance can improve reasoning but cannot objectively fail closed when the checkout is not the declared authority or product bytes are not in Git custody.
The failure is repeated, objective, and detectable without a registry, daemon, database, scheduler, dashboard, or new worktree.

boundedR3Contract.objective: Before product planning, read-only verification compares observed checkout facts with trusted expected repository identity and returns one exact actionable result. The checkout under evaluation cannot declare itself authoritative.

authorityInput.rule: Expected repository identity is trusted input external to the checkout being evaluated.
authorityInput.checkoutRole: Repository files may supply observed facts only; they cannot promote those facts to authority.

minimumBehavior: accept trusted expected repository identity before evaluating the checkout
resolve observed repository identity, top-level path, HEAD, branch or detached state, and dirty state
never infer authority from a declaration stored only inside the checkout being evaluated
detect stale, superseded, contaminated, divergent, or unversioned-product state
return PASS_CURRENT only when observed state matches trusted expected identity
return REDIRECT with one exact path/ref/commit when a different named Git authority owns the next action
return CUSTODY_REQUIRED when product bytes lack a named Git authority
return BLOCK when trusted expected identity is absent or contradictory
operate read-only and create no worktree, ref, registry, daemon, database, scheduler, dashboard, queue, or router
boundedR3Contract.integrationPreference: Extend the existing read-only readiness/entry surface rather than add a new platform or generic repository manager.
verification: Meta-Harness obvious root redirects and selected candidate worktree passes against controller-authorized or independently anchored expected identity
a checkout-local declaration cannot make Meta-Harness PASS_CURRENT
Quant obvious root redirects and exact F1A authority worktree passes
Leningrad obvious root returns CUSTODY_REQUIRED until the Alpha 0 spine is reachable from a named Git authority
missing or contradictory trusted expected identity returns BLOCK
rerun all three repositories with instrumented elapsed time and context volume
boundedR3Contract.deletionOrShrinkPath: Delete or demote the explicit guidance when model-native entry reliably resolves the same authority state and the invariant no longer catches material drift.

repositorySuite.execution: all test files executed exhaustively in bounded pinned-Node groups
repositorySuite.canonicalNpmWrapper: connector returned HTTP 502 before test evidence was returned; this is transport failure, not repository test evidence

diffCheck.note: Only a non-blocking CRLF-to-LF warning remains for docs/sop/meta-harness-sop.md.

strictReadOnlyReady.interpretation: The command combines read-only/no-exec behavior with strict requirements. It therefore marks skipped Git diff, package, GitHub settings, npm tests, and ship-gate checks as failures; it also reports inherited absence of a domain-governance surface, inherited external security-setting evidence gaps, and no pregenerated ready.json. Truth, sync, trust, contracts, state, brief, decisions, quality, reproducibility, root-leak, and transition-graph checks pass. No failure is caused by the D088 candidate diff.

scoreRecommendation.reason: The official D085/D086 state is unchanged and the proof package has not passed exact-commit independent audit.
conditions: R2A closed without a new implementation phase
common bottleneck and three response classes accepted
